Excellence in Education

Academic Programs

From nursery through secondary education, Elyon Schools offers comprehensive academic programs designed to develop well-rounded individuals prepared for success in higher education and life.

Ages 2-5 years

Nursery School

Our nursery program provides a safe, nurturing environment where young children develop foundational skills through play-based learning.

Classes Offered:

Pre-Nursery (2-3 years)Nursery 1 (3-4 years)Nursery 2 (4-5 years)

Program Highlights:

  • Play-based learning approach
  • Early literacy and numeracy skills
  • Creative arts and music
  • Social and emotional development
  • Physical development activities
  • Language development
Ages 6-11 years

Primary School

Our primary program builds strong academic foundations while nurturing curiosity, creativity, and a love for learning.

Classes Offered:

Primary 1Primary 2Primary 3Primary 4Primary 5Primary 6

Program Highlights:

  • Core subjects: English, Mathematics, Science
  • Social Studies and Civic Education
  • Computer Studies and ICT
  • French Language
  • Physical and Health Education
  • Cultural and Creative Arts
Ages 12-17 years

Secondary School

Our secondary program prepares students for national examinations and future academic pursuits with comprehensive subject offerings.

Classes Offered:

JSS 1JSS 2JSS 3SSS 1SSS 2SSS 3

Program Highlights:

  • WAEC and NECO examination preparation
  • Science: Physics, Chemistry, Biology
  • Commercial: Economics, Commerce, Accounting
  • Arts: Literature, Government, History
  • Technical and Vocational subjects
  • Career guidance and counseling

Extracurricular Activities

We believe in holistic development. Our extracurricular programs help students discover and develop their talents beyond the classroom.

Sports

Football, Basketball, Athletics, Table Tennis

Music & Drama

School band, Choir, Drama club, Cultural dance

Science Club

Experiments, Science fairs, STEM projects

Literary & Debate

Debate society, Press club, Creative writing

Arts & Crafts

Painting, Drawing, Sculpture, Craft works

Leadership

Student council, Prefect system, Community service

Our Facilities

State-of-the-art facilities to support quality education and holistic development.

Well-equipped classrooms with modern learning aids
Science laboratories (Physics, Chemistry, Biology)
Computer laboratory with internet access
Well-stocked library and reading room
Sports facilities and playground
Assembly hall and multipurpose area
Art and music rooms
Sick bay with qualified nurse
School cafeteria

Ready to Enroll?

Give your child the gift of quality education. Apply for admission today and join our community of learners.

Footer

Elyon Schools

Est. 1994

Nurturing young minds from Nursery through Secondary education. Building tomorrow's leaders with excellence in academics, character, and values.
